Names a missing-specification mechanism (undocumented additive identity schema expected by the measurement pipeline) distinct from the symptom, and rules out individual authoring mistakes via the uniformity of the drift.

Category: plugin-improvement. No Section 2 forbidden terms in Root Cause Hypothesis, Change Description, or Expected Effect; 'quality verification gate' used consistently. The one raw 'quality-gate' occurrence is confined to Problem Evidence, which the guide permits for direct citations.

findings.description: Header reads 'Audit-Attempt: 1' while the ## Category comment describes a revision after a BLOCKED attempt 1 — bookkeeping consistency note only; the counter counts BLOCKED occurrences per the orchestrator's convention and is managed by the orchestrator, not a content defect.

Meta-Change: true assessed as LOW risk: the change is purely additive identity metadata constrained to ledger-reserved values; no grader, threshold, or pass/fail criterion changes. It makes already-produced verified evidence countable rather than changing what counts as good evidence. Recorded for audit-trail completeness.
